action.reasoning: Observation: The baseline model trained for 2 epochs achieved an exprate of 0.0075. The iteration took ~2.3 minutes. Analysis: The low score is expected for only 2 epochs. Additionally, the image size (128x512) with DenseNet-121 (stride 32) results in a very small feature map (4x16 = 64 tokens), which is insufficient to align with up to 150 text tokens. Decision: 1) Increase image size to 256x1024 to get an 8x32 (256 tokens) feature map. 2) Implement a custom ResizePad transform to preserve aspect ratio. 3) Add 2D Positional Encoding for the image features. 4) Add data augmentation (RandomAffine, ColorJitter). 5) Train for 20 epochs with a warmup + cosine decay learning rate scheduler.
